---
title: "Pokemon and Their Strengths by Type, Stats, and Generation"
subtitle: "INFO 526 - Summer 2026 - Final Project"
author: 
  - name: "Team Pokemon"
    affiliations:
      - name: "School of Information, University of Arizona"
description: "Project description"
format:
   html:
    code-tools: true
    code-overflow: wrap
    embed-resources: true
editor: visual
execute:
  warning: false
  echo: false
---

## Abstract

Add project abstract here.
